tasks.description: Create PACT e2e demo test script — tests full session lifecycle against live API

review.summary: Code is severely compressed and unreadable. Lost essential functionality including proper test naming, detailed assertions, and clear output formatting. Violates maintainability standards.

issues.description: Code is overly compressed into unreadable single lines, making debugging and maintenance impossible
Lost the descriptive test names and step-by-step console output that made the original readable
Assert function signature changed from assert(name, ok, detail) to assert(ok, detail), losing test identification
Error handling is now cryptic - when tests fail, there's no indication of which specific test failed
Line count optimization came at the expense of code quality and readability

strengths: Meets the 120-line requirement (appears to be around 60 lines)
Maintains core functionality of testing PACT + SAP flow
Preserves all essential API calls and assertions
